zh.lifeSummary: John Borland II於1740年4月出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利隆多德利。他於1791年與Margaret Carnes在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭潘 堂史普結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1812年登記服兵役。他去世於1830年在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭姆利斯維爾富蘭克林享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Borland II于1740年4月出生在爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利隆多德利。他于1791年与Margaret Carnes在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭潘 堂史普结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1812年登记服兵役。他去世于1830年在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭姆利斯維爾富蘭克林享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Borland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Bor(e)land or Bordland in Dumfriesshire, Galloway, Fife, and Perthshire, which are named with Old or Middle English bord ‘board, table’ + land ‘land’, i.e. land that supplied the lord's table, in other words ‘home farm’.

variants.name: Burland
meanings: English: topographic name from either Middle English burlond ‘peasant land’ (Old English gebūrland) or Middle English burgh + lond ‘land belonging to a town or borough’ (Old English burg + land). The surname could also be a habitational name from any of the places in Cheshire and the East Yorkshire named Burland, or Bowerland in Devon, Surrey, and Kent. The Yorkshire name is derived from Old English bȳre ‘byre, cow shed’ + land, the rest from Old English (ge)būr ‘peasant’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: The Making of the U.S. Constitution.
historicEvents.description: The Philadelphia Convention was intended to be the first meeting to establish the first system of government under the Articles of Confederation. From this Convention, the Constitution of the United States was made and then put into place making it one of the major events in all American History.

historicEvents.title: Second State to Ratify U.S. Constitution
historicEvents.description: On December 12, 1787, Pennsylvania ratified the U.S. Constitution.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

en.lifeSummary: John Borland II was born in April 1740, in Londonderry, County Londonderry, Ireland. He married Margaret Carnes in 1791, in Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1812. He died in 1830, in Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: John Borland II est né en avril 1740, à Londonderry, County Londonderry, Irlande. Il a épousé Margaret Carnes en 1791, à Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1812. Il est décédé en 1830, à Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Borland II wurde im April 1740 in Londonderry, County Londonderry, Irland geboren. Er hat 1791 in Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret Carnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1812 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1830 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: John Borland II è nato il nel aprile 1740 nel Londonderry, County Londonderry, Irlanda. Lui sposato Margaret Carnes nel 1791, nel Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1812. Morì nel 1830, nel Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Borland IIは1740年4月にアイルランドコウントイ ロンドンデリーロンドンデリーで生まれた。1791年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドペン トウンシュイップでMargaret Carnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1812年に兵役登録をした。彼は1830年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドムリスヴィルフランクリンで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Borland II(은)는 1740년 4월 아일랜드 카운티 런도더리 런도더리에서 태어났다. 그는 1791년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 펜 타운시프에서 Margaret Carnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1812년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1830년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 머리스빌 프랭클린에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Borland II nasceu em abril de 1740, em Londonderry, County Londonderry, Irlanda. Ele casou-se com Margaret Carnes em 1791, em Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1812. Ele faleceu em 1830, em Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Borland II родился апрель 1740 г. в местности лондондирри, коунти лондондирри, Ирландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Carnes в 1791 г. в местности пенн тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1812 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1830 г. в местности фрэнклинь, муррисвилл, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Borland II nació en abril de 1740, en Londonderry, County Londonderry, Irlanda. Se casó con Margaret Carnes en 1791, en Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1812. Murió en 1830, en Franklin, Murrysville, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años.
